home.name: Home
home.title: Home
home.body0: Welcome to my personal portfolio and experimental sandbox. This platform serves as a space to explore emerging web technologies, prototype new features, and showcase technical projects.
home.body1: Currently, I am a Software Engineer at RM, where I leverage my expertise to drive team success and deliver high-quality software solutions. I am passionate about continuous learning and professional development.
home.body2: This site is built entirely with Vue 3, TypeScript, and modern tooling — and it doubles as both a portfolio and a playground.

about.name: About
about.title: About Me
about.body0: I hold a BSc (Hons) degree and possess a comprehensive background in professional software engineering, spanning the majority of my career.
about.body1: With over a decade of dedicated experience in software and web development, I specialize in PHP and JavaScript ecosystems. My technical proficiency extends to robust database management with MySQL and utilizing Git for advanced version control.
about.body2:
Throughout my career, I have successfully delivered projects leveraging a diverse range of modern frameworks and libraries, including:
  • Laravel and Symfony for backend PHP architecture
  • React, SolidJS, and VueJS for crafting scalable, dynamic user interfaces
about.body3: Currently serving as a Software Engineer at RM, I am committed to tackling complex technical challenges and contributing to innovative, impactful projects.

interests.name: Interests
interests.title: My Interests
interests.body0: Beyond my professional endeavors, I am deeply invested in personal development and technical exploration. I actively develop side projects to experiment with innovative concepts and stay at the forefront of emerging technologies.
interests.body1: Music is a significant creative outlet for me. I am a multi-instrumentalist with a primary focus on the guitar. I compose original pieces and regularly share my work on my YouTube channel.
interests.body2: Currently, I am expanding my technical repertoire by exploring Three.js for rendering complex 3D graphics and designing immersive web experiences. The interactive 3D environment featured on this site is a testament to these ongoing experiments.

hidden.name: Hidden
hidden.title: Hidden
hidden.body0: Welcome to the hidden page! This area isn't linked in the main navigation, but it's here for those curious enough to find it.
hidden.body1: Here are some fun projects and games I've built:
hidden.body2:
• Alcohol Checker - Calculate when you'll be sober enough to drive
  • Noughts and Crosses - Classic tic-tac-toe against a bot
  • Ask Me - Chat with an automated assistant about my background
